title: d2c Token Conflicts
description: Records within-category token value collisions detected during d2c-init Step 2b. Advisory overlay — all tokens remain in design-tokens.json; this file guides downstream consumers to prefer canonical names.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was generated or last updated.

threshold.description: Number of unresolved conflicts above which STOP AND ASK is triggered. Default 5, configurable via --conflict-threshold.

unresolved_count.description: Number of conflicts with status 'unresolved'. Convenience field — always equals conflicts.filter(c => c.status === 'unresolved').length.

id.description: Stable identifier for this conflict group (e.g., conflict-001).

category.description: Token category where the collision was detected.

resolved_value.description: The normalized value shared by all tokens in this conflict group.

canonical.description: Dotted token path chosen as canonical (e.g., colors.primary). Null when status is 'unresolved'.

duplicates.description: Dotted token paths of non-canonical tokens. Excludes the canonical path.

chosen_by.description: How the canonical token was selected. 'pending' when unresolved.

usage_counts.description: Map of dotted token path → grep-based usage count across source files.

resolution_note.description: Human-readable explanation of the resolution decision.
